lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਮਨਿ ਭਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਾ ਉਦੈ ਭਾਨੁ ਜਬ ਚੀਨਾ ॥੨॥੪੩॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer man bheaa pragaasaa udai bhaan jab cheenaa |2|43|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, my mind became enlightened, when I saw the sun rise. ||2||43||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਂਧੀ ਪਾਛੇ ਜੋ ਜਲੁ ਬਰਖੈ ਤਿਹਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਜਨੁ ਭੀਨਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: aandhee paachhe jo jal barakhai tihi teraa jan bheenaan |
lines.english: Your servant is drenched with the rain that has fallen in this storm.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਚੇਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree chetee |
lines.english: Gauree Chaytee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਤਨ ਹੀ ਅਸਮਾਨੁ ਗਿਰਾਵਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: baatan hee asamaan giraaveh |1|
lines.english: but they try to bring down the sky with their talk. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਸੁਨਹਿ ਨ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: har jas suneh na har gun gaaveh |
lines.english: They do not listen to the Lord's Praises, and they do not sing the Lord's Glories,

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਲੋਗਨ ਸਿਉ ਕਿਆ ਕਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: aise logan siau kiaa kaheeai |
lines.english: What can anyone say to such people?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀਏ ਭਗਤਿ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਜ ਤਿਨ ਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਡਰਾਨੇ ਰਹੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo prabh kee bhagat te baahaj tin te sadaa ddaraane raheeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You should always be careful around those whom God has excluded from His devotional worship. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਨ ਦੇਹਿ ਚੁਰੂ ਭਰਿ ਪਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: aap na dehi churoo bhar paanee |
lines.english: They do not offer even a handful of water,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਗਏ ਅਉਰਨ ਹੂ ਘਾਲਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aap ge aauran hoo ghaaleh |3|
lines.english: They ruin themselves, and then they ruin others. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੈਠਤ ਉਠਤ ਕੁਟਿਲਤਾ ਚਾਲਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: baitthat utthat kuttilataa chaaleh |
lines.english: Sitting down or standing up, their ways are crooked and evil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਹ ਨਿੰਦਹਿ ਜਿਹ ਗੰਗਾ ਆਨੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tih nindeh jih gangaa aanee |2|
lines.english: while they slander the one who brought forth the Ganges. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਾਡਿ ਕੁਚਰਚਾ ਆਨ ਨ ਜਾਨਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: chhaadd kucharachaa aan na jaaneh |
lines.english: They know nothing except evil talk.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਹੂ ਕੋ ਕਹਿਓ ਨ ਮਾਨਹਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: brahamaa hoo ko kahio na maaneh |4|
lines.english: They would not even obey Brahma's orders. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਗਏ ਅਉਰਨ ਹੂ ਖੋਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: aap ge aauran hoo khoveh |
lines.english: They themselves are lost, and they mislead others as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗਿ ਲਗਾਇ ਮੰਦਰ ਮੈ ਸੋਵਹਿ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aag lagaae mandar mai soveh |5|
lines.english: They set their own temple on fire, and then they fall asleep within it. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਦੇਖਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਲਜਾਨੇ ॥੬॥੧॥੪੪॥
lines.translit: tin kau dekh kabeer lajaane |6|1|44|
lines.english: Seeing them, Kabeer is embarrassed. ||6||1||44||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰਨ ਹਸਤ ਆਪ ਹਹਿ ਕਾਂਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: avaran hasat aap heh kaane |
lines.english: They laugh at others, while they themselves are one-eyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ₁ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree bairaagana₁ kabeer jee |
lines.english: Raag Gauree Bairaagan, Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਤਰ ਭੀ ਬਪੁਰੇ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਕਊਆ ਕੂਕਰ ਖਾਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pitar bhee bapure kahu kiau paaveh kaooaa kookar khaahee |1|
lines.english: Tell me, how can his poor ancestors receive what the crows and the dogs have eaten up? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤ ਪਿਤਰ ਨ ਮਾਨੈ ਕੋਊ ਮੂਏਂ ਸਿਰਾਧ ਕਰਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jeevat pitar na maanai koaoo mooen siraadh karaahee |
lines.english: He does not honor his ancestors while they are alive, but he holds feasts in their honor after they have died.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋ ਕਉ ਕੁਸਲੁ ਬਤਾਵਹੁ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: mo kau kusal bataavahu koee |
lines.english: If only someone would tell me what real happiness is!

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਸਲੁ ਕੁਸਲੁ ਕਰਤੇ ਜਗੁ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਕੁਸਲੁ ਭੀ ਕੈਸੇ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kusal kusal karate jag binasai kusal bhee kaise hoee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Speaking of happiness and joy, the world is perishing. How can happiness be found? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਪਿਤਰ ਤੁਮਾਰੇ ਕਹੀਅਹਿ ਆਪਨ ਕਹਿਆ ਨ ਲੇਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aise pitar tumaare kaheeeh aapan kahiaa na lehee |2|
lines.english: Such are your dead ancestors, who cannot ask for what they want. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਟੀ ਕੇ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਵੀ ਦੇਵਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਜੀਉ ਦੇਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: maattee ke kar devee devaa tis aagai jeeo dehee |
lines.english: Making gods and goddesses out of clay, people sacrifice living beings to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਨੀ ਭੈ ਡੂਬੇ ਸੰਸਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: raam naam kee gat nahee jaanee bhai ddoobe sansaaree |3|
lines.english: You do not know the value of the Lord's Name; you shall drown in the terrifying world-ocean. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਜੀਉ ਕਾਟਹਿ ਨਿਰਜੀਉ ਪੂਜਹਿ ਅੰਤ ਕਾਲ ਕਉ ਭਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: sarajeeo kaatteh nirajeeo poojeh ant kaal kau bhaaree |
lines.english: You murder living beings and worship lifeless things; at your very last moment, you shall suffer in terrible pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਅਕੁਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਚੇਤਿਆ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਸਿਉ ਲਪਟਾਨਾ ॥੪॥੧॥੪੫॥
lines.translit: kehat kabeer akul nahee chetiaa bikhiaa siau lapattaanaa |4|1|45|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, you have not remembered the Lord who has no ancestors; you are clinging to your corrupt ways. ||4||1||45||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵੀ ਦੇਵਾ ਪੂਜਹਿ ਡੋਲਹਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: devee devaa poojeh ddoleh paarabraham nahee jaanaa |
lines.english: You worship gods and goddesses, but you do not know the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤ ਮਰੈ ਮਰੈ ਫੁਨਿ ਜੀਵੈ ਐਸੇ ਸੁੰਨਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jeevat marai marai fun jeevai aise sun samaaeaa |
lines.english: One who remains dead while yet alive, will live even after death; thus he merges into the Primal Void of the Absolute Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree |
lines.english: Gauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਐਸਾ ਖੀਰੁ ਬਿਲੋਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: mere raam aisaa kheer biloeeai |
lines.english: O my Lord, this is the milk to be churned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਜਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਿ ਰਹੀਐ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਭਵਜਲਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anjan maeh niranjan raheeai bahurr na bhavajal paaeaa |1|
lines.english: Remaining pure in the midst of impurity, he will never again fall into the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਾਣਿ ਬਜਰ ਕਲ ਛੇਦੀ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਿਆ ਪਦੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai baan bajar kal chhedee pragattiaa pad paragaasaa |
lines.english: The Guru's arrow has pierced the hard core of this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, and the state of enlightenment has dawned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਨੂਆ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਓਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramat manooaa asathir raakhahu in bidh amrit peeoeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, hold your mind steady and stable, and in this way, drink in the Ambrosial Nectar. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਬਾਣੈ ਧਨਖੁ ਚਢਾਈਐ ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tin bin baanai dhanakh chadtaaeeai ihu jag bedhiaa bhaaee |
lines.english: Maya has drawn her bow without an arrow, and has pierced this world, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਕਤਿ ਅਧੇਰ ਜੇਵੜੀ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਚੂਕਾ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਸਿਵ ਘਰਿ ਬਾਸਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sakat adher jevarree bhram chookaa nihachal siv ghar baasaa |2|
lines.english: In the darkness of Maya, I mistook the rope for the snake, but that is over, and now I dwell in the eternal home of the Lord. ||2||
